chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1127 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.07.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Yasir Ismail Khoso, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. along with Farhan Khan Dayo Senior Accounts Officer, HMC. Mr. Farhan Khan Dayo, Senior Accounts Officer, HMC is in attendance. He has filed a Statement reflecting that the regular monthly pension is being paid and that the arrears due on account of commutation amounting to Rs.3,78,941/- would be paid by the end of August 2025. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied in that regard. By consent the Petition stands disposed of in view of the aforementioned Statement. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
